job_title: Data Analyst - Energy Programs | W2 Only (No C2C / No Visa)
strengths: Power BI dashboard building with measured impact
Experience with AI tools for automation
Proven ETL and data integration skills
weaknesses: Limited stated experience with Power Automate/Power Apps
Shorter professional tenure (~2+ years in listed analyst roles vs 5+ required)
improvement_bullets: Integrated Salesforce CRM workflows with automated data processing to manage client intake, tracking, and budget expenditures effectively, mirroring DMTS operational requirements.
Developed automated workflows using Power Automate to streamline invoice processing and data quality checks, reducing manual intervention in energy program reporting.
Built Power Apps prototypes to standardize program application intake, ensuring strict compliance with customer eligibility requirements and data integrity standards.
Managed project budgets and financial expenditures by creating automated Excel-based tracking models, ensuring alignment with departmental fiscal goals and program deliverables.
Applied data analysis expertise to monitor high-volume energy efficiency program data, identifying trends in savings documentation and optimizing contractor quality control processes.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst - Energy Programs | W2 Only (No C2C / No Visa) opportunity with Amerit Consulting. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep commitment to leveraging data-driven automation to solve complex operational challenges, particularly within the energy sector’s critical transition to clean energy. What interests me about working for Amerit Consulting is your reputation for providing high-impact staffing solutions to Fortune 500 companies; your focus on operational efficiency and client satisfaction perfectly mirrors the professional rigor I bring to data analysis. I believe my technical proficiency in the Microsoft Power Platform and my expertise in Python-based process automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have consistently approached data problems by identifying inefficiencies in manual workflows. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client onboarding and utilized Zapier and data automation to streamline the process, saving 8 hours of manual work per week. This initiative not only improved team efficiency by 25% but also allowed us to reallocate resources toward high-value lead generation, ultimately driving a 300% increase in customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst - Energy Programs role at Amerit Consulting would allow me to bring my advanced Power BI and automation skills to manage invoice processing and energy savings documentation effectively. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my relational database and quality control skills. During a critical insurance testing project, I optimized complex SQL queries and window functions to reconcile insurance data, resulting in a 30% improvement in data accuracy. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and Power Platform to support the Demand Management Tracking System (DMTS) at Amerit Consulting. I know that my technical versatility and my razor-sharp attention to detail align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
